channel.title: security on mtardy
channel.description: Recent content in security on mtardy

item.title: Kubernetes and HostPath, a Love-Hate Relationship
item.description: The article is available on Quarkslab’s blog. It traces the history of three Kubernetes-related vulnerabilities. Explaining what they are, how they were patched, and how they are related. The exploitation of these vulnerabilities allowed access to the underlying host filesystem for users that were not properly authorized.

item.title: kdigger: a Context Discovery Tool for Kubernetes
item.description: The article is available on Quarkslab’s blog. It’s an introduction to Kubernetes security through the release of a new context discovery tool, kdigger, and its mini CTF companion, minik8s-ctf.

item.title: Arbitrary code injection in Super Mario Bros 3
item.description: This write-up is the extended abstract of my final year long-project. It was an exploration about arbitrary code injection in video games.
